name: modulo-squares
description: Modulo Squares - A Firebase-powered puzzle game monorepo

scripts.deploy:web: cd packages/web && npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:app: cd packages/mobile && flutter build web && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:functions && npm run deploy:rules && npm run deploy:web
scripts.lint: cd packages/functions && npm run lint && cd ../web && npm run lint
scripts.lint:fix: cd packages/functions && npm run lint:fix && cd ../web && npm run lint:fix
scripts.format: cd packages/functions && npm run format && cd ../web && npm run format
scripts.check: cd packages/functions && npm run check && cd ../web && npm run check
scripts.clean: cd packages/mobile && flutter clean && rm -rf build/ && cd ../functions && npm run clean && cd ../web && npm run clean
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd packages/functions && npm install && cd ../web && npm install
